audits.cleanReason: Checked the two real negation-pivot candidates in lines 305 and 309; both are active route-diagnostic distinctions that change the party's next move, so they survive under the guide's binary-diagnostic keep rule.

findings.text: ...before Sylvanas laid the Millhaven manifest on the desk and his mouth closed.
findings.subject: his mouth
findings.realAgent: The clerk stopped talking when Sylvanas produced the manifest.
findings.reason: Pattern 8: the body part is stealing agency from the clerk; the person, not the mouth, is performing the action.
findings.suggestedFix: ...before Sylvanas laid the Millhaven manifest on the desk and he stopped talking.

findings.text: Unless the sowing has shifted somewhere else.
findings.subject: the sowing
findings.realAgent: The people contaminating the grain may have moved the operation to a different route.
findings.reason: The abstract operation is carrying the movement instead of the people running it, so the sentence launders agency onto the process.
findings.suggestedFix: Unless they shifted the sowing somewhere else.

None exceed the guide caps or read as the weakest generic excess instance, so no recurring-tic KILLs remain.

summary.verdictReason: Pass A passes with warnings: 2 mild intent-smear findings remain, but no moderate or severe kills and no other guide in the pass pack produced KILLs. Structural rhythm concerns and a below-target texture score remain downstream style signals, not pass-A fail conditions.

textureMetrics.interpretation: PARTICIPIAL PHRASES: 2.2% (floor: 5.0%, human: 11.0%). Add ', Ving' phrases to connect actions: ', turning back to the fire' / ', gripping the railing with both hands'. These create connective tissue between actions. | COMPOUND CLAUSES: 3.8% (floor: 4.0%, human: 8.5%). Join related ideas: ', and' / ', but' / ', yet'. Adjacent short sentences often want combining.
